retrieved_result: U.S. Passenger Carrier Delay Costs U. S. Passenger Carrier Delay Costs In 2016, the average cost of aircraft block (taxi plus airborne) time for U. S. passenger airlines was $62.55 per minute, 4.4 percent less than in 2015. Crew costs, the largest line item, rose 8.7 percent to $21.24 per minute. Fuel costs declined 18.5 percent to $
Decision_Reason: The retrieved page discusses airline costs and delays, not database query optimization.
